channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7143] sanityn test_47f: :(osd_internal.h:1087:osd_trans_exec_check()) op 9: used 8, used now 8, reserved 5
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah_lw <wei3.liu@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/c99182c6-54ed-11e5-9cd2-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_47f failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

MDS console, this may relate with LU-6969

\(src\) ========================================== 00:49:40 \(1441414180\)
00:50:16:[ 5684.377588] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanityn test 47f: pdirops: remote mkdir and rename (src) ========================================== 00:49:40 (1441414180)
00:50:16:[ 5684.514427] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl set_param fail_loc=0x80000145
00:50:16:[ 5685.660287] LustreError: 3132:0:(fail.c:133:__cfs_fail_timeout_set()) cfs_fail_timeout id 145 sleeping for 15000ms
00:50:16:[ 5685.662524] LustreError: 3132:0:(fail.c:133:__cfs_fail_timeout_set()) Skipped 26 previous similar messages
00:50:16:[ 5700.677395] Lustre: 3132:0:(osd_internal.h:1087:osd_trans_exec_check()) op 9: used 8, used now 8, reserved 5
00:50:16:[ 5700.679464] Lustre: 3132:0:(osd_handler.c:902:osd_trans_dump_creds())   create: 1/8/0, destroy: 0/0/0
00:50:16:[ 5700.681237] Lustre: 3132:0:(osd_handler.c:909:osd_trans_dump_creds())   attr_set: 2/2/0, xattr_set: 0/0/0
00:50:16:[ 5700.683062]c5>] lod_sub_object_delete+0x1c5/0x450 [lod]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0e7cd14>] lod_index_delete+0x24/0x30 [lod]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0ed82c9>] __mdd_index_delete_only+0x199/0x250 [mdd]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0ed8c36>] __mdd_index_delete+0x46/0x290 [mdd]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0ee8032>] mdd_rename+0x652/0x1440 [mdd]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0daded0>] mdt_reint_rename_internal.isra.37+0x15b0/0x1c10 [mdt]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0dafc0b>] mdt_reint_rename_or_migrate.isra.40+0x19b/0x860 [mdt]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0980a00>] ? ldlm_blocking_ast_nocheck+0x310/0x310 [ptlrpc]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa097afa0>] ? ldlm_expired_completion_wait+0x370/0x370 [ptlrpc]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0db0303>] mdt_reint_rename+0x13/0x20 [mdt]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0db40d0>] mdt_reint_rec+0x80/0x210 [mdt]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0d97989>] mdt_reint_internal+0x5d9/0xab0 [mdt]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0da0cf7>] mdt_reint+0x67/0x140 [mdt]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa0a14479>] tgt_request_handle+0x719/0x1170 [ptlrpc]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa09bcd5b>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x21b/0xa90 [ptlrpc]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa09bab68>] ? ptlrpc_wait_event+0x98/0x340 [ptlrpc]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffff810a9662>] ? default_wake_function+0x12/0x20
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffff810a0898>] ? __wake_up_common+0x58/0x90
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa09c0500>] ptlrpc_main+0xb70/0x1e90 [ptlrpc]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffff810ad8b6>] ? __dequeue_entity+0x26/0x40
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffffa09bf990>] ? ptlrpc_register_service+0xfc0/0xfc0 [ptlrpc]
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffff8109739f>] kthread+0xcf/0xe0
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffff810972d0>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffff81615018>] ret_from_fork+0x58/0x90
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007]  [<ffffffff810972d0>] ? kthread_create_on_node+0x140/0x140
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007] drm_kms_helper: panic occurred, switching back to text console
00:50:16:[ 5700.709007] ------------[ cut here ]------------
item.environment: server and client: lustre-master build #3175 RHEL7 DNE
item.summary: sanityn test_47f: :(osd_internal.h:1087:osd_trans_exec_check()) op 9: used 8, used now 8, reserved 5

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
